doctrine.name: pith times puissance
application: lead with the conceptual home and desired creative transformation
retain only distinctions that steer quality, preserve a boundary, or separate the instrument from a neighbor
use the form and cadence the desired artifact should continue
preserve user canon, productive ambiguity, and player agency
return table, play, fiction, or visual-brief utility instead of named framework theater

before.status: verbatim top-level extracts from the removed legacy monolith

named_contracts.backstory: A playable past built from charged relationships, decisions with consequences, a dangerous truth, unfinished pressure, and an opening choice; player identity and future arc remain open.
named_contracts.art_prompt: A portable visual brief only. Image creation remains a separate action requiring an explicit surrounding request; dimensions and platform syntax appear only when the destination requires them.
named_contracts.mechanics: Exact mechanical claims require supplied authoritative rules; otherwise the instruments return qualitative affordances, calibration points, and a mechanics-confidence note.
named_contracts.canon: Supplied canon remains authoritative and generated material remains proposed until the GM or player accepts it.

removed_prompt_residue: forced generic output counts and rigid archetype menus
automatic image generation and aspect-ratio defaults
legacy speaker, promotion, persona, and worked-world residue

regeneration_core_immutability.command: hash all cores; run python -B tools\curate_ludis_runtime.py --write; hash all cores again

verification.review_boundary: Static checks establish package shape, custody, forbidden-residue absence, and deterministic hashes. They do not prove creative quality, rules fidelity, fun, safety, or table performance.
